# Sample

A sample spec demonstrating specd template rendering and validation.

## echo command

- `echo` prints its argument to stdout
- `echo` output ends with \\n
- `echo` separates records with \\n\\n


## print command

- `print` prints its argument to stderr
- `print` output ends with \\n
- `print` separates records with \\n\\n
